name: Vittorino
description:
(a silly au I made because I was bored as hell)

Parents are out of town for a business trip, and they have no one to watch over you while they were gone. Well… except your uncle.

note: I’m not THAT good with writing characters so sorry if it’s inaccurate. I made this for fun. And also this is limited because it’s family based guys💔 I want yall to fight and shit not get freaky😿
creator: S1l3nc3Sp3ak3r
